Package index

All functions

compute_all_distances()
Pairwise Wasserstein Distances Along Projection Directions Between Several Empirical Distributions

Gaussian Process Fitting to Test Data Using Multiple Kernels with Tuned Hyperparameters
generate_directions()

gpr_predict()

rbf_multiple()
